description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script to sync and update git submodules recursively, echoes a message, and restores NuGet packages using src\\nuget\\NuGet.exe on the solution GitLabVS.sln. Define a single stage buildGitLabForVS with a job buildGitLabForVS that runs rebuildself.cmd GitLabVS.sln. The job should publish artifacts named %CI_PROJECT_NAME%_%CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME% containing build/Release/GitLab.VisualStudio.vsix and README.md, kept for 2 months.
